title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入厄瓜多尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入厄瓜多：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Ecuador INEN conformity requirements, ARCERNNR energy storage authorization requirements, CNEL and distribution company grid-connection technical approval requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, Cuerpo de Bomberos fire-safety installation requirements, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and Ecuador's 60 Hz / 120–240 V grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 34120-2023 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与厄瓜多尔INEN合格评定要求、ARCERNNR储能授权要求、CNEL及配电公司并网技术审批要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3运输要求及厄瓜多尔60 Hz / 120–240 V电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與厄瓜多INEN合格評定要求、ARCERNNR儲能授權要求、CNEL及配電公司併網技術審批要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3運輸要求及厄瓜多60 Hz / 120–240 V電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INEN conformity scope determination, ARCERNNR authorization, CNEL grid-connection approval, Cuerpo de Bomberos fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Ecuador INEN technical regulations, ARCERNNR storage authorization requirements, CNEL and distribution company grid-connection technical specifications, Cuerpo de Bomberos fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INEN合格评定范围裁定、ARCERNNR授权、CNEL并网批准、消防局消防安全审批、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行厄瓜多尔INEN技术法规、ARCERNNR储能授权要求、CNEL及配电公司并网技术规格、消防局消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INEN合格評定範圍裁定、ARCERNNR授權、CNEL併網批准、消防局消防安全審批、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行厄瓜多INEN技術法規、ARCERNNR儲能授權要求、CNEL及配電公司併網技術規格、消防局消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Ecuador does not yet have a comprehensive standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or Saudi SABER/IEC 62619 route. BESS projects in Ecuador operate under ARCERNNR energy storage authorization requirements, INEN conformity certification for regulated products, and distribution company (CNEL EP, EEQ, etc.) grid-connection technical approval. The critical and non-negotiable technical gap for Chinese BESS exported to Ecuador is the grid frequency and voltage difference: Ecuador operates at 60 Hz and 120/240 V (residential) / 120/208 V or 277/480 V (commercial/industrial three-phase), whereas all Chinese BESS standards — GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, NB/T 42090-2016 — are based on China's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid. PCS firmware, protection relay settings, anti-islanding parameters, and ride-through curves configured for China's 50 Hz grid cannot be directly deployed in Ecuador; full reconfiguration and independent retesting are required. Additional practical gaps are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline; (2) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements; (3) ARCERNNR storage project authorization; (4) distribution company grid-connection technical approval; (5) RTE INEN conformity certificate if BESS falls within a regulated product category; (6) Cuerpo de Bomberos fire-safety permit; and (7) UN 38.3 transport test documentation. Chinese GB standards are the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC-based evidence by INEN, ARCERNNR, or project reviewers.
answer_first.zh: 厄瓜多尔尚无与欧盟《电池法规》或沙特SABER/IEC 62619路径相当的综合性独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。厄瓜多尔的BESS项目在ARCERNNR储能授权要求、受监管产品的INEN合格认证以及配电公司（CNEL EP、EEQ等）并网技术审批框架下运作。中国BESS出口厄瓜多尔最关键且不可回避的技术差距是电网频率和电压差异：厄瓜多尔采用60 Hz、120/240 V（住宅）/ 120/208 V或277/480 V（商业/工业三相）运行，而所有中国BESS标准——GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023、NB/T 42090-2016——均基于中国50 Hz、220/380 V电网。针对中国50 Hz电网配置的PCS固件、保护继电器设置、防孤岛参数和穿越曲线无法直接用于厄瓜多尔；须进行全面重新配置并独立重新测试。其他实际差距还包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为国际预期基准；（2）IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（3）ARCERNNR储能项目授权；（4）配电公司并网技术审批；（5）若BESS属于受监管产品类别，须取得RTE INEN合格证书；（6）消防局消防安全许可；（7）UN 38.3运输测试文件。中国GB标准是生产基准，但不被INEN、ARCERNNR或项目审查方接受为基于IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 厄瓜多尚無與歐盟《電池法規》或沙特SABER/IEC 62619路徑相當的綜合性獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。厄瓜多的BESS項目在ARCERNNR儲能授權要求、受監管產品的INEN合格認證以及配電公司（CNEL EP、EEQ等）併網技術審批框架下運作。中國BESS出口厄瓜多最關鍵且不可回避的技術差距是電網頻率和電壓差異：厄瓜多採用60 Hz、120/240 V（住宅）/ 120/208 V或277/480 V（商業/工業三相）運行，而所有中國BESS標準——GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023、NB/T 42090-2016——均基於中國50 Hz、220/380 V電網。針對中國50 Hz電網配置的PCS韌體、保護繼電器設定、防孤島參數和穿越曲線無法直接用於厄瓜多；須進行全面重新配置並獨立重新測試。其他實際差距還包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為國際預期基準；（2）IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（3）ARCERNNR儲能項目授權；（4）配電公司併網技術審批；（5）若BESS屬於受監管產品類別，須取得RTE INEN合格證書；（6）消防局消防安全許可；（7）UN 38.3運輸測試文件。中國GB標準是製造基準，但不被INEN、ARCERNNR或項目審查方接受為基於IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
